title: Traditional Polish Pierogi Recipe
description: A classic Polish recipe for homemade pierogi filled with potatoes and cheese. Perfect as a side dish or main course.

ingredients.name: Rich, flaky polish dough
ingredients.notes: Use a food processor to mix dough ingredients.

ingredients.name: Cheese (such as farmer's cheese or ricotta)
Onion
ingredients.notes: Chop onion and mix with potatoes and cheese.

instructions: In a large mixing bowl, combine 2 cups of dough ingredients. Mix until a dough forms.
Knead the dough for 5-7 minutes until it is smooth and elastic.
Divide the dough into 4 equal pieces.
Roll out each piece of dough into a thin circle.
Place a tablespoon of the potato and cheese filling in the center of each dough circle.
Fold the dough over the filling and press the edges together to seal the pierogi.
Bring a large pot of salted water to a boil.
Carefully add the pierogi to the boiling water.
Cook the pierogi for 5-7 minutes, or until they float to the surface.
Remove the pierogi from the water with a slotted spoon and serve with your favorite toppings.
